title: Briefings index — 008 through 014 now linked from the archive
summary: Backfilled seven archive entries on /briefings/. The index previously listed 015 and then jumped to 007. Entries for 008 (the reveal), 009 (Cordova close), 010 (decade of decisions), 011 (when the door opens), 012 (Naomi joins), 013 (two-product company), and 014 (autonomy redirect) are now in the archive in reverse-chronological order, each with title, T+ dateline, hook prose, and three news-bearing stats. Removed the 'archive entries being added' parenthetical from the archive intro now that the gap is closed.
